title: Would ban cloud storage, AI tracking, and federal data access
description: Bars third-party cloud storage, prohibits AI vehicle tracking beyond plates, caps retention at 21 days, requires warrants, and blocks federal access. If it passed, every existing Flock contract in SC would be void.

title: Would regulate license plate reader systems statewide
description: Cleared Senate Judiciary and awaits a floor vote. Sets 90-day retention and written-policy rules — but leaves cloud storage, federal sharing, and AI tracking untouched, and authorizes the SLED database now being challenged in court.

title: Would regulate automatic license plate readers
description: Sits in House Judiciary with no action since referral. Would require transparency about sharing data with other agencies, including federal law enforcement.

title: Would regulate automated license plate readers
lastAction: Member(s) request name added as sponsor
description: In House Education & Public Works with no action. Addresses deployment oversight and data-access policies.
